creator: pmh@komma.de
text:
ipfw doesn't grok "-q" when given a rules file as second
	argument. firewall_quiet="YES" in /etc/rc.conf fails.
	This is just a little bit inconvenient, nothing serious,
	so don't bother if there's something more important to do ;-)
	OTOH: I could provide the necessary patch, if you like.

Fix: 

change command line parsing in /usr/src/sbin/ipfw/ipfw.c
How-To-Repeat: 
	ipfw -q /some/file/name
